creator: mvharding@gmail.com
text: This patch keeps avahi-daemon from running at all.  According to https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/rc-scripting/article.html, 'BEFORE:' means 'mountd' will run before avahi-daemon, not after.  'rcorder' also now shows a loop, and avahi-daemon goes down in flames since it can't find the dbus socket.  More details tomorrow AM.
